name: Batteryman Fuel Cell
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>燃</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ねん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>料</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>電</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>でん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>池</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ち</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>メン
desc: If you control 2 or more face-up "Batteryman" monsters, you can Special Summon this card from your hand. Once per turn, you can Tribute 1 "Batteryman" monster, except this card, to select 1 card your opponent controls and return it to its owner's hand.
mnst_eff: If you control 2 or more face-up "Batteryman" monsters, you can Special Summon this card from your hand. Once per turn, you can Tribute 1 "Batteryman" monster, except this card, to select 1 card your opponent controls and return it to its owner's hand.
eff: If you control 2 or more face-up "Batteryman" monsters, you can Special Summon this card from your hand. Once per turn, you can Tribute 1 "Batteryman" monster, except this card, to select 1 card your opponent controls and return it to its owner's hand.

action: Returns from your opponent's field to your opponent's hand
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
